mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate directly lower the discount rate for equity valuations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, which forces equity prices lower over the next quarter.
failure_condition: S&P 500 forward 60-day returns remain positive in more than 55% of instances when UNRATE rises above the 0.5pp threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand recovery, driving positive equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns when either series declines, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample tests.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating industrial production indicates strengthening corporate output capacity and earnings momentum, which pushes S&P 500 prices higher over the next week.
failure_condition: INDPRO acceleration yields negative or flat 5-day forward returns during late-cycle phases, or the signal loses predictive power when GDP growth exceeds 3% annually.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate profit expectations, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Quarterly GDP revisions show zero or negative correlation with 60-day forward equity returns across multiple business cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and margin compression, causing negative S&P 500 returns over the next month.
failure_condition: Equity markets consistently rally following CPIAUCSL spikes above the 0.4% threshold, or inflation surprises show no predictive power for 20-day returns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with stable or declining federal funds rates signal accommodative growth conditions, producing positive equity returns over the following month.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform a baseline model when FEDFUNDS rises concurrently with PAYEMS, or interaction effect vanishes in walk-forward validation.

mechanism_narrative: Strong retail sales growth confirms robust consumer spending momentum, which drives immediate positive S&P 500 returns over the next week.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of instances when RSAFS growth surpasses the 1.5% threshold.
